name: Administradora General De Fondos Security SA - Fondo De Inversion Security Rentas Inmobiliarias I
summary: Administradora General De Fondos Security SA - Fondo De Inversion Security Rentas Inmobiliarias I is a real estate income investment fund. It is managed by Administradora General De Fondos Security SA and focuses on generating returns through investments in income-producing real estate properties.
